home.heroSubtitle: Pick a module below to get started.
home.modulesSubtitle: Shipped brick by brick. Upcoming modules are visible but disabled.

referentiel.title: Master data
referentiel.desc: Single source: products, customers, sites, carriers.

coffre_certifs.title: Certification vault
coffre_certifs.desc: GlobalG.A.P., GRASP, BRCGS… with expiry alerts.

onboarding.title: Onboarding & specs
onboarding.desc: Qualified lead → active customer, space creation.

booking.title: Booking
booking.desc: Booking the line arms the shipment file.

chargement.title: Packing & loading
chargement.desc: QR / photo at loading, product proof, datalogger.

documents_gate.title: Documents & Gate
documents_gate.desc: AI checker + “Check OK” lock before departure.

tracking.title: Transport & tracking
tracking.desc: A container's whole journey from its number.

qualite_client.title: Reception & quality
qualite_client.desc: Customer quality feedback analysed by AI.

portail_client.title: Customer portal
portail_client.desc: Customers track their shipments, docs, stats.

hub_email.title: Email & AI hub
hub_email.desc: Auto emailing + AI import of attachments.

tracking.title: Track a container's whole journey
tracking.subtitle: Enter a container, booking or shipment number to see its timeline, position, temperature curve and arrival risk score.
tracking.emptyBody: Enter a number above, or pick an example, to display the shipment's whole journey.
tracking.notFoundBody: Check the number you entered (container, booking or shipment reference) and try again.
tracking.dbError: Database unreachable. Check .env.local and that Supabase is running.

map.title: Position & route
map.unavailable: Map unavailable — WebGL is disabled in this browser.

sensor.title: Temperature & humidity (datalogger)
sensor.noData: No sensor readings available for this shipment.

risk.title: Arrival risk score
risk.computed: Computed from age at shipping, transit duration and temperature excursions.

lots.title: Your shipments, end to end
lots.subtitle: The filterable list of every shipment. Click a shipment to open its 360° view: journey, documents, quality and origin.
lots.count: {count, plural, =0 {No shipment} one {# shipment} other {# shipments}}
lots.notFoundBody: This shipment does not exist or has been removed.
lots.noTracking: The journey will be available once a container number is attached to this shipment (booking confirmed).

documents.title: Shipment documents
documents.empty: No document uploaded for this shipment.
documents.hint: Upload and verify documents in the “Compliance & Gate” tab.

quality.title: Quality reports
quality.empty: No quality report for this shipment.
quality.hint: Quality feedback imported by email is analysed by AI (defects, score, verdict) and matched to the shipment.

origin.title: Origin & field traceability
origin.empty: No origin data for this shipment.
origin.hint: The Cropwise connector links this shipment to its plot/harvest — click “Sync from Cropwise”.

booking.title: Booking dossier & confirmation
booking.subtitle: The booking channel varies (direct carrier, broker, forwarder, phone…) — the tool doesn't force one. It standardises the dossier to send out, then creates the shipment as soon as a single confirmation step happens: container number, carrier, departure date.

form.title: New request
form.hint: Generates the booking dossier (standardised text, copyable to any channel).
form.dossierCree: Dossier generated — see the register below.

list.title: Dossier register
list.hint: Copy the dossier to your usual channel, then confirm as soon as the carrier replies.

confirm.pasteEmailPlaceholder: Paste the confirmation email text here (carrier, broker, forwarder…)

quick.title: Direct booking
quick.hint: Without a prior dossier — when the booking was handled entirely outside the tool.

gate.mailSent: “Check OK” email sent to customer / broker

help.vert: Documents complete and compliance validated: the gate is open and the email has been sent to the customer / broker.
help.rouge: {anomalies} blocking anomaly(ies) and {conformite} compliance check(s) failing. Shipping stays blocked until everything is green.
help.en_attente: No verification has run on this file yet. Click “Run AI verification” to cross-check documents and compliance.

conformite.title: Compliance checklist (country / product)
conformite.empty: Run the verification to assess the file's compliance.

anomalies.title: Document anomalies (AI checker)
anomalies.pending: Run the verification to detect inconsistencies between documents.

overview.title: The “Check OK” gate of your files
overview.subtitle: Overview of compliance status per shipment. Nothing leaves until documents and compliance are green. Click a shipment to open its file.

qualite.kicker: T2 · Email hub & M9 · Customer quality
qualite.title: The quality loop, automated
qualite.subtitle: Quality feedback arrives by email: the PDF is imported, matched to the right shipment and analysed by AI (defects, score, verdict). Trends consolidate by product, customer and site.

inbox.title: Inbox (mock)
inbox.subtitle: Incoming emails with a PDF attachment. Import to match the shipment and run the AI analysis.

trends.title: Quality trends
trends.subtitle: Verdict breakdown and recurring defects, aggregated over analysed feedback.
trends.empty: No quality analysis yet. Import feedback from the inbox.

chargement.title: Proof of departure, at loading
chargement.subtitle: Scan the QR or photograph a box at loading. The box photo becomes visible to the customer in their portal; every capture is timestamped and logged in the shipment timeline.
chargement.preuveCount: {count, plural, =0 {No proof} one {# proof} other {# proofs}}
chargement.panelHelp: Upload a photo of a product box (visible to the customer) and/or the loading QR / photo (internal). Each proof timestamps and logs the shipment loading.
chargement.empty: No proof attached to this shipment yet.

portail.subtitle: Track your shipments, their status, your documents and the product photo at departure.
portail.myLots: {count, plural, =0 {No shipment} one {# shipment} other {# shipments}}
portail.empty: No shipment is attached to you yet.
portail.notFound: This shipment does not exist or is not accessible to you.

login.title: Sign in to your space
login.subtitle: Enter your work email: you'll receive a secure sign-in link (magic link), no password required.
login.sent: A sign-in link was sent to {email}. Open it to access your space.
login.error: Invalid or expired link. Please request a new sign-in link.

detail.noPhoto: No product photo available for this shipment.
detail.noDocuments: No document available for this shipment.

dashboard.title: Steer your service, at a glance
dashboard.subtitle: Filter by customer, product, country or risk level. Service rate and delay rate recompute over the matching shipments.

kpi.serviceCaption: {count, plural, =0 {no arrived shipment evaluated} one {over # arrived shipment} other {over # arrived shipments}}
kpi.lateCaption: {count, plural, =0 {no late shipment} one {# late shipment} other {# late shipments}}

planning.title: Departure planning, planned vs actual
planning.subtitle: The week-by-week planning imported from your Excel. Each planned departure is reconciled with the shipment that actually left, to surface slippage.
planning.empty: No planning rows yet. Import your Excel file to get started.

import.title: Import planning (Excel / CSV)
import.help: Expected columns: week, customer, product, variety, destination, planned quantity, unit, lot (actual shipment reference, optional). Lenient headers.
import.success: {inserted} row(s) imported, {lots} linked to an actual shipment.

demande.title: Request, certification matching & onboarding
demande.subtitle: A request comes in (product × country × client). The platform automatically checks certification coverage against the vault: if everything is covered, the presentation pack and certificates are sent automatically; otherwise an alert and a correction workflow are created.

form.title: New request
form.hint: Enter the product and country: certification matching is instant.
form.mailSent: Presentation pack + certifications sent (mock) to the client.

coffre.title: Certification vault
coffre.subtitle: Natural Kiss certifications, their product/country coverage and validity. Matching relies strictly on this vault.

overview.title: Payment status & disputes
overview.subtitle: Payment status per shipment, invoice consistency (cross-checked against the AI document verifier) and disputes — a light ledger, not a full accounting engine.
overview.litigesCount: {count, plural, one {# open dispute} other {# open disputes}}

overview.title: Proactive alerts
overview.subtitle: Vessel delay, temperature excursion, missing document, quarantine risk — computed from tracking, sensor data and the Gate.

overview.title: Summarize threads, draft documents
overview.subtitle: Pick an email thread to get an AI summary, a reply draft, and (when a shipment is matched) an instruction sheet.
